intro.title: QUALITY IS DESIGNED FROM THE BEGINNING
intro.subtitleLine: Your presence defines your place in the
intro.desc: We think, structure and execute with method and precision so your brand is not only present, but stands out and competes globally.

steps.label: STEP 1
steps.title: Initial diagnosis
steps.text: We analyze your business and needs.

steps.label: STEP 3
steps.title: UX/UI Design
steps.text: We craft a clear, modern interface.

faq.subAccent: How we work, timelines, and what each VYKA plan includes.
faq.subRest: Full transparency for your next digital project.

items.title: Is the payment one-time or monthly?
items.content: It’s a one-time payment for the initial development. Once the project is delivered, the site is yours with no mandatory monthly fees. You only pay for what you need, when you need it.

items.title: Can I upgrade my plan later?
items.content: Yes. You can start with one plan and upgrade when your business requires it. The structure is prepared to scale without rebuilding everything from scratch.

items.title: What’s the delivery time?
items.content: It depends on scope and plan, but we typically deliver within 7 to 20 business days. We confirm a clear timeline before starting.

items.title: Do I get post-delivery support?
items.content: Yes. We include post-delivery support for initial tweaks and questions. If you later want ongoing maintenance or improvements, we can offer it as an optional plan.

cta.title: STILL HAVE QUESTIONS?
cta.subLine1: We’ll help you choose the best path for your project.
cta.subLine2: Our team is ready to advise you with no commitment.

plego.desc: A website built to convey a solid, professional brand image.

baviera.desc: A landing page focused on presenting the brand and simplifying contact.

fralo.desc: An institutional website designed to strengthen the business’s digital presence.

text.p1b: we design and build digital solutions focused on real results.
text.p2: We work directly with each client, understanding their business to create clear, functional experiences aligned with their goals.

planes.title: What
planes.nota: One-time investment · Your site, your control

features: Full audit of your current website

planesDetalle.descripcion: Plan 1 is designed for those who need a professional, clear, and well-structured online presence without complex systems or internal management. It is ideal for launching a brand, refreshing its image, or having a modern business website that builds trust and generates inquiries.
paraQuien: Companies that do not need to self-manage content

pasos.descripcion: We define the foundation and content order for a clear experience.
We create a visual proposal aligned with the brand identity.
We review, refine, and approve the final version before development.
We build the website focusing on performance, clarity, and stability.
We adapt the site to all devices and integrate what is needed.
We validate the project, publish it, and support the final handoff.

planesDetalle.modalidad: Custom quote based on project scope.

planesDetalle.descripcion: Plan 2 is aimed at brands and businesses that need a professional, solid, and self-managed website, ready to grow and evolve over time. It is not just online presence. It is structure, order, and control over content.
planesDetalle.enfoque: Strategic design + editable system + scalable foundation.
paraQuien: Projects that require a blog or dynamic content management

pasos.descripcion: We organize sections, priorities, and navigation to bring clarity to the site.
We design a professional, solid interface aligned with the brand.
We refine the proposal until it is approved for development.
We build a solid, organized foundation prepared for growth.
We implement a self-managed content panel and editing system.
We leave the site live, validated, and with progress follow-up.

planesDetalle.modalidad: Custom quote based on project scope.

planesDetalle.descripcion: Plan 3 is designed for brands and businesses that want to sell online professionally, with a clear, functional store optimized to turn visits into sales. It is not just about having a cart. It is about designing a solid, clear, and scalable buying experience.
planesDetalle.enfoque: Shopping UX + commercial structure + self-managed system.
paraQuien: Businesses selling physical or digital products
Brands that want to formalize online sales
Businesses currently selling through Instagram or WhatsApp
Stores with a small or medium catalog
Projects that need a system without complex logic

pasos.descripcion: We define the main presentation and key store pages.
We design the ideal journey to make conversion easier.
We organize the catalog and refine the proposal before development.
We develop the store with an editable system and clear commercial structure.
We configure the catalog, payments, and basic logistics options.
We validate the project, publish it, and support the process.

planesDetalle.modalidad: Custom quote based on project scope.

planesDetalle.descripcion: Plan 4 is aimed at companies that need much more than a website or an e-commerce solution. Here, complete digital platforms are designed: internal systems, private portals, dashboards, CRM, intranets, or custom solutions built to scale over time.
planesDetalle.enfoque: Strategic architecture + process-oriented UX + modular development.
paraQuien: Teams that manage users and permissions

pasos.descripcion: We gather goals, context, needs, and business logic.
We define modules, priorities, and the overall system structure.
We organize development by stages to move forward with control.
We design views, flows, and hierarchies according to the system.
We create screens and navigable prototypes to validate the experience.
We adjust the experience according to profiles, permissions, and needs.
We build the frontend and backend on a modular and scalable foundation.
We connect services, validate flows, and test stability.
We publish and validate the system by modules or sprints.

planesDetalle.modalidad: Stage-based budget. Custom quote depending on the number of modules, complexity, integrations, user volume, and required infrastructure.

planesDetalle.subtitulo: Strategic Reconstruction of an Existing Website
planesDetalle.descripcion: Plan 5 is aimed at brands and companies that already have a website but need to modernize it, reorganize it, or improve its performance. Sometimes the right move is to rebuild it with strategic criteria.
planesDetalle.enfoque: Previous analysis + structural redesign + technical improvement.
paraQuien: Brands that need to modernize their image
Projects that want to improve without losing positioning

pasos.descripcion: We analyze the project structure, content, and overall condition.
We evaluate performance, technical foundation, and improvement opportunities.
We determine whether it is best to redesign, rebuild, or fully reconstruct.
We rethink sections, hierarchies, and site navigation.
We update the aesthetics for a more modern and clearer image.
We refine the redesign until it is ready for reconstruction.
We rebuild the site on a cleaner and more efficient structure.
We optimize speed, stability, and adaptation across devices.
We launch the rebuilt and validated website.

planesDetalle.modalidad: The final value depends on the current state of the site, the number of sections to rebuild, the level of redesign needed, and the technical complexity.

projectDetail.resultsDesc: The goal is not just to have a visually attractive website. The goal is to build a clear, professional digital presence ready to generate real opportunities.

historia.aria: Who we are and why VYKA was created
historia.lead: We design and develop digital products with a defined methodology. Every project starts with a structure, a goal, and a validation process.
historia.cardTitleLine1: Not every project needs more design.
historia.cardTextBefore: At VYKA, we start with structure.

alan.description: Implements interfaces with attention to detail, provides technical support, and supports the commercial process when needed.
